chosen_action.title: 3 Verification Patterns That Make AI-Generated Code Trustworthy

shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: post-hold rerun already exists, Apollo blocked, SO packet already delivered
why_this_action.reasoning: Draft was already complete and untracked in git. Deploying it is an autonomous owned_content lane that doesn't need external channels. All 3 manual-handoff packets on the execution board are stale/current/delivered; regenerating them would be fake progress. The blog post is net-new content that pushes the sitemap from 100→101 URLs (adding fresh indexable surface), uses the Codeberg star + pipx install CTA pattern, and is a natural content asset for future distribution lanes once the hold clears.
